changes.value:
1. Add pub icon: Option<String> to OwnedLspServerSpec in types.rs
2. Add icon field to all 5 existing YAML files
3. Create 7 new YAML files for missing languages
4. Add all_servers() and servers_for_extensions() to registry.rs
5. Add tests
6. Update yaml_loader fallback"
